description: Minimalistic party girl glam is what these shoes are perfect for. A satiny upper with crystal embellishments and a slinky, slim heel. Wear this with a blingy ensemble to balance the tones. This pair is perfect for a low-key evening do, showcasing elegance and style without fussy details.Heel: 3.5"UpperSatin strap covering the forefoot and the midfoot with crystal encrusted detailsPadded footbed with a heel patch and embossed brandingOutsoleTPU outsole with a stiletto style heelTextured grooves on the heel capshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
